x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Portal is a primary delivery channel for Now Assist self-service AI features. Unconfigured or inactive portals prevent Now Assist from surfacing AI search, suggested articles, and virtual agent to end users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Verify active Service Portals via sp_portal_list.do. Ensure Employee Center or Service Portal is configured and accessible. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal for end-user delivery.
